title: Pork-Flavored Thai Rice Tom Kha Noodle
description: A smoky and flavorful Thai dish featuring vermicelli rice noodles, made in the style of northeastern Thailand, suitable for Jain diets.

ingredients.name: Fish sauce (optional, omit for Jain diet)

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the sliced pork and cook until browned, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 4 minutes.
Add the Tom Kha paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the pork stock and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in the coconut milk and let it heat through, about 2 minutes.
Season with fish sauce (if using), salt, and lime juice.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cook the vermicelli rice noodles according to the package instructions and drain.
Serve the noodles in bowls and pour the hot Tom Kha sauce over the noodles.
Garnish with Thai basil leaves and serve immediately.
